MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-12-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MILITARY ORDER OF THE PURPLE HEART OF THE UNITED STATE OF AMERICA DEPARTMENT OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED; 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE PLAINTIFF HAS ADEQUATELY PLED ESTOPPEL AND THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE THAT PLAINTIFF'S RELIANCE WAS UNREASONABLE FROM THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
